name: debug
description: Debugging team — competing hypotheses with parallel investigation

agents.name: hypothesis-a
agents.focus: Investigate data flow, state management, race conditions, stale cache as potential root causes

agents.name: hypothesis-b
agents.focus: Investigate configuration, environment, dependencies, network, timeouts as potential root causes

agents.name: hypothesis-c
agents.focus: Investigate business logic errors, off-by-one, null handling, type coercion, edge cases as potential root causes

task_template: Investigate the bug: {bug_description}. Your theory: {agent.focus}. Gather evidence for or against your hypothesis. Report: (1) Evidence found, (2) Root cause assessment (confirmed/unlikely/inconclusive), (3) Suggested fix if confirmed.
